S3_PUBLIC_ACCESS.fix: Block public access and restrict bucket policy

EC2_NO_IAM_ROLE.description: EC2 instance does not have an IAM role
EC2_NO_IAM_ROLE.fix: Attach an IAM role with least-privilege permissions

EC2_OPEN_SG.description: EC2 security group allows public inbound traffic
EC2_OPEN_SG.fix: Restrict inbound rules to trusted IP ranges

NO_VPC_ISOLATION.description: Resources are not isolated inside a private VPC
NO_VPC_ISOLATION.fix: Deploy resources inside a private VPC with subnets

NO_NAT_GATEWAY.description: Private compute resources lack NAT Gateway
NO_NAT_GATEWAY.fix: Add NAT Gateway for outbound internet access

S3_ENCRYPTION_DISABLED.description: S3 bucket encryption must be enabled

EC2_OPEN_SSH.fix: Restrict SSH access to trusted IP ranges

EC2_NO_AUTOSCALING.description: EC2 is not part of an Auto Scaling Group
EC2_NO_AUTOSCALING.fix: Use Auto Scaling Group for resilience

EC2_SINGLE_AZ.description: EC2 deployed in a single Availability Zone
